case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB VS. WAN, DAVID A/K/A D WAN et al

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 4, 2013, TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOTION TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 10, 2013. MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-01-2014 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2013 Set For Trial On Apr-01-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2013 Continued To Dec-18-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-04-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - The motion for summary judgment and summary adjudication is denied. There is a triable issue of material fact regarding what sum of money (if any) that defendant owes to plaintiff. See Declaration of David Wan. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(G) AND CRC 3.1312.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-02-2013 Continued To Nov-04-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is continued to November 4, 2013, to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the motion to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 10, 2013. The Court has the opposition and reply papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Continued To Nov-06-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
